prose: The Fukui-reactivity calculation on ferrocene was performed using the GFN2-xTB method in the gas phase. The most electrophilic site, based on F+ indices, is the iron atom (atom index 11, label 11, symbol Fe) with a Fukui index of 0.22885456. Warnings include charge conservation alerts suggesting the N+1 and N-1 states did not fully converge, but the overall calculation completed successfully.
